name: Gold Card
perks: 4x Membership Rewards points at restaurants worldwide and on takeout and delivery in the US
4x at US supermarkets (up to $25,000 per year, then 1x)
3x on flights booked directly with airlines or via Amex Travel
$120 dining credit ($10/month) at select restaurants (Grubhub, The Cheesecake Factory, etc.)
$120 Uber Cash credit ($10/month) toward Uber Eats orders or rides in the US
Points transfer to 20+ airline and hotel partners
Car rental loss and damage insurance
drawbacks: Dining and grocery credits require enrollment and have specific merchant restrictions
4x dining capped at combined $25,000 with groceries
No airport lounge access (upgrade to Platinum for that)
Not accepted at all merchants that Visa/Mastercard are
